name: RABBIT-FILE-BUG-21
title: ID format is ambiguous when feature name contains hyphens
description: branch_ops._format_id produces e.g. 'RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-17' for feature 'rabbit-cage'. Because the feature is upper-cased but hyphens are preserved, parsing this back into (feature, type, n) is ambiguous - is the feature 'RABBIT' with type 'CAGE-BUG' and n=17, or 'RABBIT-CAGE' with type 'BUG' and n=17? No regex split is reliable for multi-word features. Spec example explicitly shows 'RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-17' as the canonical format but provides no parser. Fix: pick an unambiguous separator (e.g. RABBIT_CAGE-BUG-17 using underscore inside feature, or RABBIT.CAGE-BUG-17) OR commit to type-position-from-right parsing convention and document it.
